brand.about:
The Reserve AI Photonics DTF (PHOTON) is a weighted basket of public, US-listed photonics companies at the center of the AI buildout.

The basket is composed of companies that generate significant revenue from AI data-center photonics demand, weighted by market capitalization with a 20% cap and a $5B minimum market cap, rebalanced quarterly. 

Why a photonics DTF? Inside AI data centers, light is replacing copper wire: as AI chips get faster and more data-hungry, the bottleneck shifts from computing the data to moving it, and copper hits a physical wall of heat, power loss, and limited reach. The PHOTON DTF gives you direct exposure to the companies making that shift: the fiber, lasers, transceivers, and optical chips that have become the central nervous system of the AI data center.

PHOTON bundles Ondo Global Markets tokenized stocks, each of which is backed by actual shares held by Ondo in a regulated US brokerage account.

The Reserve AI Capacity & Neocloud DTF (NEOCLOUD) is a weighted basket of public, US-listed neocloud and AI data-center companies at the center of the AI buildout.  

The basket is composed of companies that generate significant revenue from AI compute demand, weighted by market capitalization with a 20% cap and a $5B minimum market cap, rebalanced quarterly. 

Why a neocloud DTF? Building an AI data center costs billions, so most companies that need AI computing rent it instead: a new industry of neoclouds and power-rich data-center operators raises the capital, secures the power, and rents out compute by the hour. The NEOCLOUD DTF gives you direct exposure to the companies turning capital, silicon, and electricity into the compute everyone needs: the GPU-cloud operators and the power-rich sites that host them.

NEOCLOUD bundles Ondo Global Markets tokenized stocks, each of which is backed by actual shares held in a regulated US brokerage account.

The Reserve AI Infrastructure DTF (BUILDOUT) is a weighted basket of public, US-listed semiconductor and hardware companies at the center of the AI buildout. 

The basket holds the 25 largest US-listed companies across this AI hardware stack, weighted by market capitalization with a 10% cap, rebalanced quarterly. 

Why an AI infrastructure DTF? Before any model can run, someone has to build the machine: the chips that compute, the memory that feeds them, the equipment and foundries that make them, and the power that runs it all. The BUILDOUT DTF gives you direct exposure to the picks and shovels of the AI buildout: the semiconductors, memory, manufacturing equipment, networking, and power that every AI dollar flows through first. 

BUILDOUT bundles Ondo Global Markets tokenized stocks, each of which is backed by actual shares held in a regulated US brokerage account.

The Reserve AI Power DTF (POWER) is a weighted basket of public, US-listed power companies at the center of the AI buildout.

The basket is composed of companies that generate significant revenue from AI data-center power demand, weighted by market capitalization with a 20% cap and a $10B minimum market cap, rebalanced quarterly. 

Why a power DTF? Strip away the software and the chips, and AI comes down to electricity: a single AI data center can draw as much power as a small city, and the grid was never built for hundreds of them. The POWER DTF gives you direct exposure to the companies that generate, move, and condition that electricity: the gas turbines, nuclear plants, grid and electrical equipment, and power chips behind the AI buildout.

POWER bundles Ondo Global Markets tokenized stocks, each of which is backed by actual share held in a regulated US brokerage account.

The Reserve Robotics DTF (ROBOTS) is a weighted basket of public, US-listed robotics and automation companies at the center of the AI buildout.  

The basket is composed of companies with significant and growing exposure to robotics and automation demand, weighted by market capitalization with a 20% cap and a $2B minimum market cap, rebalanced quarterly. 

Why a robotics DTF? AI is moving off the screen and into the physical world: the same breakthroughs that taught software to reason are now teaching machines to perceive, decide, and act, and to take on physical labor. The ROBOTS DTF gives you direct exposure to the companies building that transition: the humanoids, surgical robots, factory and warehouse automation, lidar, machine vision, and the chips that let machines navigate the real world.

ROBOTS bundles Ondo Global Markets tokenized stocks, each of which is backed by actual shares held in a regulated US brokerage account.

The Bloomberg Galaxy Crypto Index DTF tracks the Bloomberg Galaxy Crypto Index (“BGCI”). The BGCI is a benchmark designed to measure the performance of the largest cryptocurrencies by market capitalization traded in USD. The Index is owned and administered by Bloomberg and co-branded with Galaxy Digital Capital Management.

Index constituents are selected based on qualified exchange and daily liquidity qualifications set forth by BGCI rules. Each constituent represents a holding no more than 35% of the Index and no less than 1% of the Index’s overall value. Cryptocurrencies are considered for addition/removal to/from the Index on a monthly basis.

The Open Stablecoin Networks Index is a value-weighted DTF that tracks DeFi’s ten strongest open stablecoin networks in one $OPEN token. Eligible projects are first whitelisted by vSQUILL-OPEN governance, which reviews asset backing, peg design, mint and redeem rules, safety mechanisms, revenue sharing, and decentralized control. Whitelisted projects are then ranked and weighted, with only the top ten included. 

Weights use a composite score: 60% on TVL relative to FDV, comparing supplied value to market valuation, 20% on year-over-year TVL growth, and 20% on liquidity efficiency. Quarterly rebalances cap holdings at 40% and set a 1% minimum to help reduce concentration risk and smooth large swings.

The Alpha Base Index is a DAO-governed DTF, curating the top alpha Base projects with the highest risk-adjusted growth potential, leveraging the collective intelligence of the Base Trenches to identify market opportunities.

You can set it and go to BED. An equal weighted basket of BTC and ETH aimed to DCA into each constituent through monthly rebalancing and earn additional yield through lending into high-quality, low-risk isolated risk money markets. A good night’s sleep.

The MarketVector™ Token Terminal Fundamental Index DTF tracks the MarketVector™ Token Terminal Fundamental Index (MVTT10F), designed to track the performance of the largest and most liquid digital assets that meet the fundamental criteria of daily average fees and daily average users. The fundamental data is provided by Token Terminal. The index is weighted based on fundamental factors.

The CoinDesk DeFi Select Index DTF tracks the CoinDesk DeFi Select Index (DFX), designed to measure the market capitalization weighted performance of some of the largest and most liquid digital assets classified in the Decentralized Finance (“DeFi”) Sector that meet certain trading and custody requirements.

The DeFi Growth Index tracks the performance of early-stage DeFi projects that demonstrate innovative mechanisms and established market demand, with strong potential for significant growth in user base, transaction volume, and/or Total Value Locked (TVL) as relevant. This is achieved through a curated portfolio of tokens native to these projects.

brand.about: Store of value engineered for resilience. ixEDEL combines humanity's proven stores of value—gold, Bitcoin, Swiss Franc—with yield-bearing stables to preserve purchasing power whether markets face inflation, deflation, growth, or stagnation. No directional macro bets required.

AIndex aims to provide users with diversified exposure to the top-performing AI agents and AI infrastructure projects. By leveraging the Base blockchain ecosystem, AIndex offers a carefully curated and balanced index of AI-focused tokens, allowing holders to benefit from the growth of AI technology and infrastructure while minimizing individual project risk.

An index exclusively tracking governance tokens of protocols that bring real-world assets (e.g. T-bills, corporate debt, commodities) onto the blockchain, emphasizing credible tokenization, verifiable collateral, and regulatory clarity upheld by audits or attestations.

basket.name: Tokenised Morpho Position - Aave interest bearing USDC

brand.about: This index tracks a curated basket of tokens from core DeFi sectors—including lending/borrowing protocols, decentralized exchanges, stablecoin issuers, yield aggregators, and other smart contract-based financial primitives.

The MarketVector™ Digital Assets 25 Index DTF tracks the MarketVector™ Digital Assets 25 Index (MVDA25) which is a modified market cap-weighted index which tracks the performance of the 25 largest and most liquid digital assets. Most demanding size and liquidity screenings are applied to potential index components to ensure investability.

The Strategic Base Reserve by EnigmaFund Venture Capital is a DAO-governed DTF, curating the best of Base projects restoring liquidity and attention to the premiere projects, builders and communities. A part of the Strategic Super Reserve, governed with the $SSR token.

The Zora Index (ZINDEX) is a dynamic token basket that tracks a curated selection of high-signal creator and cultural assets on Zora. The index is governed by holders of CreatorDAO’s $CREATOR token. The basket is designed to evolve over time, reflecting changes in creator activity, cultural momentum, and onchain engagement across Zora, while maintaining a focus on assets viewed as foundational within the ecosystem.

Eligibility criteria:
The initial index filters for established, high conviction creators and projects who have traded on Zora for at least 90 days, generated over $500,000 in total volume, strong recent activity ($100,000 in the last 30 days and $5,000 in the last 7 days), hold an onchain rank of 50 or better, and maintain a minimum audience of 1,500 followers on Twitter or Farcaster. 
We also allow for clear outliers: if a coin is the number one asset on Zora, it may be included regardless of whether it meets every threshold, since leaders of that size are impossible to ignore. 

Each asset’s weight in the portfolio is determined using a square root function of the asset’s market cap relative to the total market cap of all coins in the basket. 
For any future additions to the index, the same criteria will guide consideration (though they may evolve as the market grows) with final inclusion determined by a DAO vote.
The index is rebalanced every two weeks.
